tm96.effectEn: Teaches Nature Power to a compatible Pokémon.
tm96.flavorEn: Uses a move which depends upon the terrain.

flavorByGame.lets_go_pikachu___eevee: This attack makes use of nature’s power. Its effects vary depending on the user’s environment.
flavorByGame.sword___shield: The user stabs the target with a sharp horn. This attack never misses.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: The target is slugged with a punch thrown at maximum power. It's also one of the PokÃ©tch's hidden moves.

tm97.effectEn: Teaches Dark Pulse to a compatible Pokémon.
tm97.flavorEn: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

flavorByGame.sun___moon: This attack makes use of nature’s power. Its effects vary depending on the user’s environment.
flavorByGame.ultra_sun___ultra_moon: This attack makes use of nature’s power. Its effects vary depending on the user’s environment.
flavorByGame.lets_go_pikachu___eevee: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.
flavorByGame.sword___shield: The user swings its body around violently to inflict damage on everything in its vicinity.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: A strong wind blows away the target's barriers, such as Reflect or Light Screen, and lowers their evasiveness. It's also one of the PokÃ©tch's hidden moves.

tm98.effectEn: Teaches Power Up Punch to a compatible Pokémon.
tm98.flavorEn: Raises the user’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

flavorByGame.sun___moon: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.
flavorByGame.ultra_sun___ultra_moon: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.
flavorByGame.lets_go_pikachu___eevee: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.
flavorByGame.sword___shield: Driven by frustration, the user attacks the target. If the user's previous move has failed, the power of this move doubles.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: The user attacks with a punch that may lower the target's Defense stat. It's also one of the PokÃ©tch's hidden moves.

tm99.effectEn: Teaches Dazzling Gleam to a compatible Pokémon.
tm99.flavorEn: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

flavorByGame.sun___moon: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.
flavorByGame.ultra_sun___ultra_moon: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.
flavorByGame.lets_go_pikachu___eevee: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.
flavorByGame.sword___shield: The user swings its tough tail wildly and attacks opposing Pokémon. This also lowers their Attack stats.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch. It's also one of the PokÃ©tch's hidden moves.

tm100.effectEn: Teaches Confide to a compatible Pokémon.
tm100.flavorEn: Lowers the target’s Special Attack by one stage.

pokemon-box-link.flavorEn: A device that allows you to access the Pokémon storage system. There are some places where it won't work.

fishing-rod--galar.flavorEn: Use it by the water to fish up various kinds of Pokémon.

rotom-bike.flavorEn: This bike can be combined with the Pokémon Rotom to not only do a turbo boost but also run on the water.

camping-gear.flavorEn: Everything you need to set up a tent and get cooking in a Wild Area or at a camping spot.

rusted-sword.flavorEn: It is said that a hero used this sword to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

rusted-shield.flavorEn: It is said that a hero used this shield to halt a terrible disaster in ancient times. But it's grown rusty and worn.

sweet-apple.flavorEn: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's exceptionally sweet.

tart-apple.flavorEn: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's exceptionally tart.

throat-spray.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder uses a sound-based move, this throat spray will boost its Sp. Atk stat.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: Raises Sp. Atk when a Pokémon uses a sound-based move.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder uses a sound-based move, this throat spray will boost its Sp. Atk stat.
flavorByGame.legends_z-a: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder uses a sound-based move, this throat spray will boost its Sp. Atk stat.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: Raises Speed sharply when a Pokémon misses with a move because of accuracy.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: Raises Speed sharply when a Pokémon misses with a move because of accuracy.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed when Trick Room takes effect.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: An item to be held by a Pokémon. Lowers Speed when Trick Room takes effect.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: An item to be held by a Pokémon. If Trick Room takes effect, this item will lower the holder's Speed stat.

exp-candy-xs.flavorEn: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very small amount of Exp. Points.

exp-candy-s.flavorEn: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a small amount of Exp. Points.

exp-candy-m.flavorEn: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a moderate amount of Exp. Points.

exp-candy-l.flavorEn: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a large amount of Exp. Points.

exp-candy-xl.flavorEn: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will grant a single Pokémon a very large amount of Exp. Points.

dynamax-candy.flavorEn: A candy that is packed with energy. If consumed, it raises the Dynamax Level of a Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will raise the Dynamax Level of a single Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: A candy that is packed with energy. When consumed, it will raise the Dynamax Level of a single Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: A candy that is packed with energy. If consumed, it raises the Dynamax Level of a Pokémon by one. A higher level means higher HP when Dynamaxed.

tr00.flavorEn: A frenetic dance to uplift the fighting spirit. This sharply raises the user's Attack stat.

tr01.flavorEn: The user drops onto the target with its full body weight. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

tr02.flavorEn: The target is scorched with an intense blast of fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr03.flavorEn: The target is blasted by a huge volume of water launched under great pressure.

tr04.flavorEn: The user attacks everything around it by swamping its surroundings with a giant wave.

tr05.flavorEn: The target is struck with an icy-cold beam of energy. This may also leave the target frozen.

tr06.flavorEn: A howling blizzard is summoned to strike opposing Pokémon. This may also leave the opposing Pokémon frozen.

tr07.flavorEn: A powerful low kick that makes the target fall over. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

tr08.flavorEn: A strong electric blast crashes down on the target. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

tr09.flavorEn: A wicked thunderbolt is dropped on the target to inflict damage. This may also leave the target with paralysis.

tr10.flavorEn: The user sets off an earthquake that strikes every Pokémon around it.

tr11.flavorEn: The target is hit by a strong telekinetic force. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tr12.flavorEn: The user relaxes and lightens its body to move faster. This sharply raises the Speed stat.

tr13.flavorEn: The user takes a deep breath and focuses so that critical hits land more easily.

tr14.flavorEn: The user waggles a finger and stimulates its brain into randomly using nearly any move.

tr15.flavorEn: The target is attacked with an intense blast of all-consuming fire. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr16.flavorEn: The user charges at the target and may make it flinch.

tr17.flavorEn: The user temporarily empties its mind to forget its concerns. This sharply raises the user's Sp. Def stat.

tr18.flavorEn: The user drains the target's blood. The user's HP is restored by half the damage taken by the target.

tr19.flavorEn: The user strikes with a simultaneous three-beam attack. This may also burn, freeze, or paralyze the target.

tr20.flavorEn: The user creates a substitute for itself using some of its HP. The substitute serves as the user's decoy.

tr21.flavorEn: An all-out attack that becomes more powerful the less HP the user has.

tr22.flavorEn: Unsanitary sludge is hurled at the target. This may also poison the target.

tr23.flavorEn: The user lays a trap of spikes at the opposing team's feet. The trap hurts Pokémon that switch into battle.

tr24.flavorEn: The user rampages and attacks for two to three turns. The user then becomes confused.

tr25.flavorEn: The user materializes an odd psychic wave to attack the target. This attack does physical damage.

tr26.flavorEn: The user endures any attack with at least 1 HP. Its chance of failing rises if it is used in succession.

tr27.flavorEn: While it is asleep, the user randomly uses one of the moves it knows.

tr28.flavorEn: Using its tough and impressive horn, the user rams into the target with no letup.

tr29.flavorEn: The user switches places with a party Pokémon in waiting and passes along any stat changes.

tr30.flavorEn: The user compels the target to keep using the move it encored for three turns.

tr31.flavorEn: The target is slammed with a steel-hard tail. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

tr32.flavorEn: The user crunches up the target with sharp fangs. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

tr33.flavorEn: The user hurls a shadowy blob at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tr34.flavorEn: Two turns after this move is used, a hunk of psychic energy attacks the target.

tr35.flavorEn: The user attacks in an uproar for three turns. During that time, no Pokémon can fall asleep.

tr36.flavorEn: The user attacks by exhaling hot breath on opposing Pokémon. This may also leave those Pokémon with a burn.

tr37.flavorEn: The target is taunted into a rage that allows it to use only attack moves for three turns.

tr38.flavorEn: The user catches the target off guard and swaps its held item with its own.

tr39.flavorEn: The user attacks the target with great power. However, this also lowers the user's Attack and Defense stats.

tr40.flavorEn: The user employs its psychic power to exchange Abilities with the target.

tr41.flavorEn: The user launches a kick that lands a critical hit more easily. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr42.flavorEn: The user lets loose a horribly echoing shout with the power to inflict damage.

tr43.flavorEn: The user attacks the target at full power. The attack's recoil harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

tr44.flavorEn: The user absorbs a mystical power from space to raise its Defense and Sp. Def stats.

tr45.flavorEn: The user attacks by shooting muddy water at opposing Pokémon. This may also lower their accuracy.

tr46.flavorEn: The user hardens its body's surface like iron, sharply raising its Defense stat.

tr47.flavorEn: The user slashes the target with huge sharp claws.

tr48.flavorEn: The user tenses its muscles to bulk up its body, raising both its Attack and Defense stats.

tr49.flavorEn: The user quietly focuses its mind and calms its spirit to raise its Sp. Atk and Sp. Def stats.

tr50.flavorEn: The user handles a sharp leaf like a sword and attacks by cutting its target. Critical hits land more easily.

tr51.flavorEn: The user vigorously performs a mystic, powerful dance that raises its Attack and Speed stats.

tr52.flavorEn: The user tackles the target with a high-speed spin. The slower the user compared to the target, the greater the move's power.

tr53.flavorEn: The user fights the target up close without guarding itself. This also lowers the user's Defense and Sp. Def stats.

tr54.flavorEn: The user lays a trap of poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team. The spikes will poison opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

tr55.flavorEn: The user cloaks itself in fire and charges the target. This also damages the user quite a lot. This attack may leave the target with a burn.

tr56.flavorEn: The user lets loose a blast of aura power from deep within its body at the target. This attack never misses.

tr57.flavorEn: The target is stabbed with a tentacle, arm, or the like steeped in poison. This may also poison the target.

tr58.flavorEn: The user releases a horrible aura imbued with dark thoughts. This may also make the target flinch.

tr59.flavorEn: The user slams a barrage of hard-shelled seeds down on the target from above.

tr60.flavorEn: The user slashes at the target by crossing its scythes or claws as if they were a pair of scissors.

tr61.flavorEn: The user generates a damaging sound wave by vibration. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tr62.flavorEn: The target is attacked with a shock wave generated by the user's gaping mouth.

tr63.flavorEn: The user attacks with a ray of light that sparkles as if it were made of gemstones.

tr64.flavorEn: The user heightens its mental focus and unleashes its power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tr65.flavorEn: The user draws power from nature and fires it at the target. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tr66.flavorEn: The user tucks in its wings and charges from a low altitude. This also damages the user quite a lot.

tr67.flavorEn: The user makes the ground under the target erupt with power. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tr68.flavorEn: The user stimulates its brain by thinking bad thoughts. This sharply raises the user's Sp. Atk stat.

tr69.flavorEn: The user focuses its willpower to its head and attacks the target. This may also make the target flinch.

tr70.flavorEn: The user gathers all its light energy and releases it all at once. This may also lower the target's Sp. Def stat.

tr71.flavorEn: The user whips up a storm of leaves around the target. The attack's recoil harshly lowers the user's Sp. Atk stat.

tr72.flavorEn: The user violently whirls its vines, tentacles, or the like to harshly lash the target.

tr73.flavorEn: The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target.

tr74.flavorEn: The user slams the target with its steel-hard head. This may also make the target flinch.

tr75.flavorEn: The user stabs the target from below with sharpened stones. Critical hits land more easily.

tr76.flavorEn: The user lays a trap of levitating stones around the opposing team. The trap hurts opposing Pokémon that switch into battle.

tr77.flavorEn: The user snares the target with grass and trips it. The heavier the target, the greater the move's power.

tr78.flavorEn: The user strikes everything around it by swamping the area with a giant sludge wave. This may also poison those hit.

tr79.flavorEn: The user slams into the target with its heavy body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

tr80.flavorEn: The user hurls an electric orb at the target. The faster the user is than the target, the greater the move's power.

tr81.flavorEn: The user turns the target's power against it. The higher the target's Attack stat, the greater the damage it deals.

tr82.flavorEn: The user attacks the target with stored power. The more the user's stats are raised, the greater the move's power.

tr83.flavorEn: The user teleports using a strange power and switches places with one of its allies.

tr84.flavorEn: The user shoots boiling hot water at its target. This may also leave the target with a burn.

tr85.flavorEn: The user is roused, and its Attack and Sp. Atk stats increase.

tr86.flavorEn: The user shrouds itself in electricity and smashes into its target. This also damages the user a little.

tr87.flavorEn: The user crashes into its target while rotating its body like a drill. Critical hits land more easily.

tr88.flavorEn: The user slams its target with its flame-covered body. The more the user outweighs the target, the greater the move's power.

tr89.flavorEn: The user attacks by wrapping its opponent in a fierce wind that flies up into the sky. This may also confuse the target.

tr90.flavorEn: The user plays rough with the target and attacks it. This may also lower the target's Attack stat.

tr91.flavorEn: Opposing Pokémon are drenched in an odd poisonous liquid. This lowers the Attack, Sp. Atk, and Speed stats of a poisoned target.

tr92.flavorEn: The user damages opposing Pokémon by emitting a powerful flash.

tr93.flavorEn: The user swings both arms and hits the target. The target's stat changes don't affect this attack's damage.

tr94.flavorEn: The user fiercely attacks the target using its entire body.

tr95.flavorEn: The user attacks the target's throat, and the resultant suffering prevents the target from using moves that emit sound for two turns.

tr96.flavorEn: The user attacks the enemy with a pollen puff that explodes. If the target is an ally, it gives the ally a pollen puff that restores its HP instead.

tr97.flavorEn: The user bites the target with its psychic capabilities. This can also destroy Light Screen and Reflect.

tr98.flavorEn: The user slams into the target using a full-force blast of water. This may also lower the target's Defense stat.

tr99.flavorEn: The user attacks by slamming its body into the target. The higher the user's Defense, the more damage it can inflict on the target.

tm00.effectEn: Teaches Mega Punch to a compatible Pokémon.
tm00.flavorEn: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

wishing-piece.flavorEn: Throw one into a Pokémon Den to attract a wild Dynamax Pokémon.

cracked-pot.flavorEn: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea poured from it is delicious.

chipped-pot.flavorEn: A peculiar teapot that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea poured from it is delicious.

hi-tech-earbuds.flavorEn: Strange earbuds that allow you to freely control the volume of various sounds.

catching-charm.flavorEn: Having one of these mysterious, unshakable charms makes it more likely you'll get a critical catch.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting a critical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn't shake much.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting a critical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn't shake much.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: Having one of these mysterious, unshakable charms makes it more likely you'll get a critical catch.
flavorByGame.legends_z-a: Having one of these mysterious, unshakable charms makes it more likely you'll get a critical catch.

rotom-catalog.flavorEn: A catalog of devices that Rotom like. Use the catalog to have Rotom hop in and out of the various devices listed within.

max-honey.flavorEn: Honey that Dynamax Vespiquen produces. Adding this honey to Max Soup makes the taste very smooth. It also has the same effect as a Max Revive.

max-mushrooms.flavorEn: Mushrooms that have the power of changing Dynamax forms. They boost all stats of a Pokémon during battle.

galarica-twig.flavorEn: A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that grows in certain areas around the Galar region. It's a material for an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that grows in certain areas around the Galar region. Itâs a material for an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

flavorByGame.legends_z-a: A twig from a species of tree called Galarica that grows in certain areas around the Galar region. It's a material for an accessory for a certain Pokémon.

galarica-cuff.flavorEn: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: A cuff made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Giving it to Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

style-card.flavorEn: Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: A card that increases the selection in boutiques and hair salons.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: A card that increases the selection in boutiques and hair salons.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons.
flavorByGame.legends_z-a: Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons.

exp-charm.flavorEn: A charm that increases the Exp. Points that Pokémon can get. A machine-like object is inside the charm.

armorite-ore.flavorEn: Rare ore that can be obtained on the Isle of Armor. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector on the Isle of Armor.

mark-charm.flavorEn: Having one of these mysterious and unique charms makes it more likely you'll encounter a Pokémon with a mark.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: A mysterious and unique charm that increases the chance of finding a Pokémon with a mark.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: A mysterious and unique charm that increases the chance of finding a Pokémon with a mark.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: Having one of these mysterious and unique charms makes it more likely you'll encounter a Pokémon with a mark.
flavorByGame.legends_z-a: Having one of these mysterious and unique charms makes it more likely you'll encounter a Pokémon with a mark.

galarica-wreath.flavorEn: A wreath made from woven-together Galarica Twigs. Placing it on the head of a Galarian Slowpoke makes the Pokémon very happy.

dynite-ore.flavorEn: Mysterious ore that can be obtained in the Max Lair. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector in the Crown Tundra.

ability-patch.flavorEn: A patch that can be used to change the regular Ability of a Pokémon to a rarer Ability.

flavorByGame.sword___shield: A patch that allows a Pokémon with a regular Ability to have a rare Ability.
flavorByGame.brilliant_diamond___shining_pearl: A patch that allows a Pokémon with a regular Ability to have a rare Ability.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: A patch that can be used to change the regular Ability of a Pokémon to a rarer Ability.
flavorByGame.legends_z-a: A patch that can be used to change the regular Ability of a Pokémon to a rarer Ability.

adamant-crystal.flavorEn: An item to be held by Dialga. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

flavorByGame.legends_arceus: When used on Dialga, this large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.
flavorByGame.scarlet___violet: An item to be held by Dialga. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.
flavorByGame.legends_z-a: An item to be held by Dialga. This large, glowing gem wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

lustrous-globe.flavorEn: An item to be held by Palkia. This large, glowing orb wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

flavorByGame.legends_arceus: When used on Palkia, this large, glowing orb wells with power and allows the Pokémon to change form.

blank-plate.flavorEn: A stone tablet imbued with the essence of normalcy. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of the Normal type.

strange-ball.flavorEn: A mysterious ball that has an unknown effect on catching Pokémon.

legend-plate.flavorEn: A stone tablet imbued with the essence of all creation. When used on a certain Pokémon, it allows that Pokémon to gain the power of every type there is.

rotom-phone.flavorEn: The latest model of smartphone. A Pokémon called Rotom lives within it, and it can be used to run all sorts of handy apps.

sandwich.flavorEn: A dish made by sandwiching vegetables, meat, or other ingredients between two pieces of bread. It makes a fantastic meal when out on a picnic.

koraidons-poke-ball.flavorEn: A Poké Ball that can hold the mysterious Pokémon known as Koraidon. A boy named Arven gave it to you.

miraidons-poke-ball.flavorEn: A Poké Ball that can hold the mysterious Pokémon known as Miraidon. A boy named Arven gave it to you.

tera-orb.flavorEn: An orb that holds within it the power to crystallize. When it is charged with energy, it can be used to cause Pokémon to Terastallize.

scarlet-book.flavorEn: A record of an expedition to the Great Crater of Paldea, given to you by Professor Sada. The book has the name âSadaâ written on it in clumsy handwriting.

violet-book.flavorEn: A record of an expedition to the Great Crater of Paldea, given to you by Professor Turo. The book has the name âTuroâ written on it in clumsy handwriting.

tiny-bamboo-shoot.flavorEn: A small and rare bamboo shoot. It's quite popular with a certain class of gourmands.

big-bamboo-shoot.flavorEn: A large and rare bamboo shoot. It's extremely popular with a certain class of gourmands.

scroll-of-darkness.flavorEn: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of darkness.

scroll-of-waters.flavorEn: A peculiar scroll that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. Written upon it are the true secrets of the path of water.

malicious-armor.flavorEn: A peculiar set of armor that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. Malicious will lurks within it.

rock-tera-shard.flavorEn: On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokémon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.

dragon-tera-shard.flavorEn: On rare occasions, these shards form when a Tera Pokémon falls in battle and its Tera Jewel shatters.

booster-energy.flavorEn: An item to be held by Pokémon with certain Abilities. The energy that fills this capsule boosts the strength of the Pokémon.

ability-shield.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This cute and rather unique-looking shield protects the holder from having its Ability changed by others.

clear-amulet.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This clear, sparkling amulet protects the holder from having its stats lowered by moves used against it or by other Pokémon's Abilities.

mirror-herb.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This herb will allow the holder to mirror an opponent's stat increases to boost its own stats—but only once.

punching-glove.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This protective glove boosts the power of the holder's punching moves and prevents direct contact with targets.

covert-cloak.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This hooded cloak conceals the holder, tricking the eyes of its enemies and protecting it from the additional effects of moves.

loaded-dice.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This loaded dice always rolls a good number, and holding one can ensure that the holder's multistrike moves hit more times.

teal-style-card.flavorEn: Having one of these cards increases the selection available to you in boutiques and hair salons.

teal-mask.flavorEn: A teal mask patterned after the face of an ogre. Ogerpon dropped it while fleeing up the stairs after visiting the Festival of Masks.

glimmering-charm.flavorEn: Having one of these mysterious glimmering charms increases the number of Tera Shards you receive from Tera Raid Battles.

crystal-cluster.flavorEn: A cluster of the crystals found within the Crystal Pool. They sparkle brilliantly and are apparently necessary to repair a certain mask.

fairy-feather.flavorEn: An item to be held by a Pokémon. This feather, which gleams faintly when hit by light, boosts the power of the holder's Fairy-type moves.

wellspring-mask.flavorEn: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Water type during battle.

hearthflame-mask.flavorEn: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Fire type during battle.

cornerstone-mask.flavorEn: An item to be held by Ogerpon. This carved wooden mask is adorned with crystals and allows Ogerpon to wield the Rock type during battle.

syrupy-apple.flavorEn: A peculiar apple that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It's exceptionally syrupy.

unremarkable-teacup.flavorEn: A peculiar teacup that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be cracked, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

masterpiece-teacup.flavorEn: A peculiar teacup that can make a certain species of Pokémon evolve. It may be chipped, but tea drunk from it is delicious.

health-mochi.flavorEn: A mochi cake with Berries kneaded into its dough. It increases base points for a Pokémon's HP stat.

muscle-mochi.flavorEn: A mochi cake with Berries kneaded into its dough. It increases base points for a Pokémon's Attack stat.

resist-mochi.flavorEn: A mochi cake with Berries kneaded into its dough. It increases base points for a Pokémon's Defense stat.

genius-mochi.flavorEn: A mochi cake with Berries kneaded into its dough. It increases base points for a Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat.

clever-mochi.flavorEn: A mochi cake with Berries kneaded into its dough. It increases base points for a Pokémon's Sp. Def stat.

swift-mochi.flavorEn: A mochi cake with Berries kneaded into its dough. It increases base points for a Pokémon's Speed stat.

linking-cord.effectEn: Allows a Pokemon whose evolution is usually triggered by trading to evolve
linking-cord.flavorEn: A string exuding a mysterious energy that makes you feel a strange sense of connection. It's loved by certain Pokémon.

tm226.flavorEn: The user raises its allies’ morale with a draconic cry so that their future attacks have a heightened chance of landing critical hits. This rouses Dragon types more.

tm229.flavorEn: The user reacts to the target's movement and strikes with the heel of its palm, making the target flinch. This move fails if the target is not readying a priority move.

black-augurite.flavorEn: A glassy black stone that produces a sharp cutting edge when split. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.

peat-block.flavorEn: A block of muddy material that can be used as fuel for burning when it is dried. It's loved by a certain Pokémon.

feather-ball.flavorEn: A ball that flies fast and true—ideal for catching nimble Pokémon or Pokémon that fly high in the air.

wing-ball.flavorEn: An improvement on the original Feather Ball design. A ball that flies fast and true—ideal for catching nimble Pokémon.

jet-ball.flavorEn: The ultimate iteration of the Feather Ball. A ball that flies fast and true—ideal for catching nimble Pokémon or Pokémon that fly high in the air.

leaden-ball.flavorEn: An improvement on the original Heavy Ball design. A ball that is too heavy to fly high or far, but it is highly effective if you manage to hit an unsuspecting Pokémon.

gigaton-ball.flavorEn: The ultimate iteration of the Heavy Ball. A ball that is too heavy to fly high or far, but it is highly effective if you manage to hit an unsuspecting Pokémon.

origin-ball.flavorEn: A ball used by the Galaxy Team to catch Pokémon. It has a high catch rate.
